title: BOQ Project
description: The home of a building-services BOQ project: its buildings, cost roll-up and exports.

steps.title: Project buildings
steps.description: Every building in this BOQ project is listed here.
steps.voiceScript: This is your BOQ project. Each building you add appears here with its cost.
steps.captionText: This is your BOQ project. Each building you add appears here with its cost.
steps.fallbackMessage: Project buildings: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Add a building
steps.description: A BOQ is built building by building, floor by floor.
steps.voiceScript: Add a building to start pricing its floors and services.
steps.captionText: Add a building to start pricing its floors and services.
steps.fallbackMessage: Add a building: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Cost plan and summary
steps.description: The roll-up totals every building and floor.
steps.voiceScript: The cost plan and summary roll every floor and building into one total.
steps.captionText: The cost plan and summary roll every floor and building into one total.
steps.fallbackMessage: Cost plan and summary: not visible on this screen yet.
